name: automated-javadocs
description: Gone are the days of manually typing Javadoc comments for your methods! Automated Javadocs is a VSCode plugin that automates the process of writing Javadoc comments. The plugin will use AI to scan the entire Java file and write comments for all your methods and constructors, filling in all the required fields and a brief description of what that method does.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
